title: Three different airliners report the same UFO sighting [2015]
excerpt: JULY, 23rd, 2015. 11:15 am. text_preview: JULY, 23rd, 2015. 11:15 am. In a clear sky night over the city of Palmas, capital of the State of Tocantins, a flashing luminous object with no defined shape with colors oscillating between blue and green was spotted by four witnesses from three different airliners. According to them, the object was at an altitude of approximately 34,000 feet, moving in a straight line in the SE / NE direction following air traffic. The sighting lasted about 20 minutes. The official report also included complementary observations made by COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] based on
summary: Crews of three separate airliners over Palmas all observed the same blue-green flashing light at ~34,000 ft for 20 minutes on 23 Jul 2015.
